milestone.title: Ground phase — build against the real codebase
milestone.goal: A task's contract, tests and build are grounded in the real current codebase: a new ground phase (a phase-0 preamble before the seven steps) gathers the actual files, symbols, signatures, patterns and conventions the work touches, surfaced as anchors the frozen contract cites — so the AI builds against reality, not assumption.

ground-phase-engine.title: Insert ground as phase-0 in the engine ladder

ground-bundle-wiring.title: Wire grounding into the freeze checklist + status/check (measure)

ground-prose-align.title: Name the ground phase in book + skill + GLOSSARY
